themes.label_zh: 上线、监控、恢复和长期运行是交付的一部分
themes.merge_decision: 合并进 Ship mode,把上线和恢复视为交付一部分。

themes.label_zh: 工具调用必须可安装、可验收、可回滚
themes.merge_decision: 合并成工具可安装、可验收、可回滚原则。

themes.label_zh: 先把愿望压成可验收规格
themes.merge_decision: 合并进黄金闭环第 1 步: 先定义可验收结果。

themes.label_zh: 用测试、评测、日志和探针证明完成
themes.merge_decision: 合并进黄金闭环第 4 步和 Done Means Evidence。

themes.label_zh: 代码审查和可维护性是默认门槛
themes.merge_decision: 合并成 Review mode 和质量门槛。

themes.label_zh: 上下文工程比单次提示词更重要
themes.merge_decision: 合并进找证据和写回,避免只靠一次提示词。

themes.label_zh: secret、私有数据、许可证和供应链风险必须前置
themes.merge_decision: 前置为硬 gate,不进入普通建议流。

themes.label_zh: 多 agent 需要主控、分工、合并和证据
themes.merge_decision: 合并成主控/worker/本地 adapter 三层分工。

themes.label_zh: 把 agent 行为写成仓库规则而不是口头约定
themes.merge_decision: 合并成 AGENTS/CLAUDE/Cursor 三入口规则。

themes.label_zh: 训练要保留数据、配置、指标、探针和失败记录
themes.merge_decision: 合并为训练实验模板和坏 run 不算成果。

themes.label_zh: 小步迭代,每步都能回滚和验证
themes.merge_decision: 合并成最小可验证 slice,丢弃大而全计划。

themes.label_zh: 关键判断保留人工/强模型复核
themes.merge_decision: 保留为强模型/人工最终判断,本地 adapter 不当老师。

radar_sources.why: MIT-licensed agentic skills framework and software development methodology.
MIT-licensed high-star Claude/Codex/Cursor harness, skills, rules, hooks, and research-first development patterns.
MIT-licensed very high-star open-source coding agent; use for product/workflow signal and terminal-agent ergonomics.
MIT-licensed JavaScript style guide with strong lint/review conventions.
Apache-2.0 high-star runnable AI agents/RAG app collection; use as runnable-app pattern radar, not canonical engineering authority.
MIT-licensed generative AI curriculum with practical lessons.
MIT-licensed toolkit for spec-driven development; useful for Chinese product/engineering workflow skills.
MIT-licensed, extremely high-star practical skills from Matt Pocock; strong signal for concise, senior-engineer agent workflows.
Apache-2.0 high-star open-source Gemini CLI agent; useful for terminal-agent UX and tool workflow comparison.
MIT-licensed high-star browser automation for agents; useful for tool-use and verification patterns.
High-star MCP server collection; API license detection is not clean, so use as metadata/radar unless license is manually verified.
MIT-licensed prompt/context/RAG/agent guide and resources.
High-star AI-driven development product; API license detection is not clean, so use as product radar only.
MIT-licensed practical API recipes, eval patterns, and AI product examples.
MIT-licensed meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for Claude Code.
Apache-2.0 high-star autonomous coding agent; useful as product/workflow signal for coding-agent UX and safety boundaries.
MIT-licensed minimal GPT training/finetuning reference from Andrej Karpathy.
MIT-licensed high-star practice pack for moving from vibe coding to agentic engineering.
MIT-licensed high-star multi-agent orchestration framework; useful for role/task/handoff abstractions.
MIT-licensed spec-driven development for AI coding assistants.
MIT-licensed high-star document agent/OCR platform; useful for retrieval and document-grounded agent patterns.
MIT-licensed production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
MIT-licensed Claude cookbook; useful for practical agent/prompt/eval examples and comparison with claude-cookbooks.
MIT-licensed Claude usage recipes and notebooks for agent/prompt/eval workflows.
Google open-source style guides with verified CC-BY-3.0 license; useful for code/doc quality rules.
BSD-licensed GoogleTest docs and examples; useful for testing skill patterns.
MIT-licensed multi-harness agent/plugin marketplace for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Gemini CLI.
MIT-licensed community library for Copilot instructions, agents, skills, hooks, workflows, and plugins.
Apache-2.0 high-star source-controlled AI checks and coding-agent workflows; useful for enforceable rules and CI checks.
MIT-licensed Obsidian skills; directly useful for the user's shared local knowledge system.
MIT-licensed high-star resilient agent graph framework; useful for state, edges, retries, and durable workflows.
MIT-licensed raw C/CUDA LLM training reference; useful for GPU worker training literacy.
MIT-licensed multi-agent workflow framework; useful for handoffs, tools, guardrails, and agent orchestration vocabulary.
MIT-licensed minimal GPT implementation; useful for teaching transformer training concepts.
MIT-licensed cross-agent skills directory; useful as a discovery and taxonomy source.
MIT-licensed high-star index of 1000+ Claude skills; use as discovery/radar and overlap signal, not as authority for body extraction.
MIT-licensed high-star Claude Code configuration framework; useful for commands/personas/workflow taxonomy, with persona hype filtered out.
MIT-licensed neural networks curriculum from zero to hero.
Production-grade agent principles covering prompt ownership, context windows, tool contracts, control flow, human contact, and small focused agents.
Google engineering practices: code review author/reviewer norms with a verified CC-BY-3.0 license.
MIT-licensed AGENTS.md open format and examples for coding agents.
MIT-licensed high-star prompt/agent/RAG testing and red-team framework; useful for eval and security gates.
MIT-licensed catalog of Claude Code subagents; useful for role taxonomy and install patterns.
MIT-licensed OpenAI eval framework; useful for eval authoring discipline, registry mindset, and model-graded evaluation patterns.
Apache-2.0 Uber Go Style Guide; useful for concrete style-to-review examples.
MIT-licensed broad Claude Code skills/plugins/commands collection across engineering and productivity.
MIT-licensed minimal autograd and neural net teaching implementation.
Large ADR examples/reference index; useful as radar for decision-record taxonomy but not clean for extraction because of non-commercial/share-alike terms.
Apache-2.0 high-star LLM evaluation framework; useful for eval-first quality gates.
MIT-licensed high-star context engineering intro; strong signal that production AI coding depends on context systems, not prompt tricks.
Open deep research agent workflow with model/tool separation and benchmark-aware iteration.
High-star human-in-the-loop agent workflow signal; API license detection is not clean, so use as metadata/radar.
Apache-2.0 Hugging Face ecosystem skills for agents.
Apache-2.0 Google product and technology agent skills.
MIT-licensed context engineering handbook inspired by Karpathy-style context design.
MIT-licensed meta-prompting and long-running autonomous agent workflow system.
Rust RFCs are a mature public record of design rationale, consensus, lifecycle, and tradeoff documentation.
React RFCs show design-before-change for a world-scale frontend project and are useful for product/API proposal discipline.
Security audit skills with reciprocal license requirements; useful but requires attribution/share-alike handling.
Real-world GitHub issue fixing benchmark; useful for verifier discipline, repo-context realism, and task taxonomy.
MIT-licensed standards/spec injection system for spec-driven development.
OpenTelemetry specification demonstrates strong versioning, stability, semantic conventions, compatibility, and library guidance.
Kubernetes KEPs connect design docs to stage gates, release tracking, ownership, and cross-team coordination.
MIT-licensed Claude Code requirements-design-tasks-implementation and bugfix workflows.
Go project design documents show a mature proposal workflow for deciding what deserves design-before-code and how changes are shepherded.
Microsoft field engineering playbook with checklists for code-with engagements, testing, reviews, security, DevOps, documentation, and team execution.
Apache-2.0 SRE checklist; useful for long-running machine and service operations.
MIT-licensed skills, MCP servers, custom agents, and Agents.md for SDK grounding.
Markdown ADR template workflow with lightweight decision records that teams can actually maintain.
MIT-licensed framework for large language model evaluations with task/scorer separation and tool/sandbox-aware evaluation.
MIT-licensed Expo/EAS skills, useful as a concrete mobile/app-platform skill pattern.
Rust API guidelines provide crisp, evaluable API quality criteria: naming, ergonomics, future-proofing, errors, documentation, and consistency.
Benchmark for realistic tool-agent-user interactions; useful for task realism and agent workflow evals.
MIT-licensed pure Markdown orchestrator plus specialized subagents for structured feature development.
Companion eval collection for Inspect AI; useful for benchmark packaging and reusable eval conventions.
Apache-2.0 curated coding-agent skills and AGENTS.md playbooks across Codex/Claude/Cursor/OpenAI Codex-like tools.
MIT-licensed curated production-grade coding-agent skills; useful for battle-tested workflow comparison.
Enterprise-scale coding-agent evaluation signal with repository-scale context and auditable task framing.
